message: Bump 0.5.3 build to 19 and refresh appcast

files.patch:
@@ -5,6 +5,7 @@ APP_NAME="CodexBar"
 APP_IDENTITY="Developer ID Application: Peter Steinberger (Y5PE65HELJ)"
 APP_BUNDLE="CodexBar.app"
 ZIP_NAME="CodexBar-0.5.3.zip"
+BUILD_NUMBER="19"
 
 if [[ -z "${APP_STORE_CONNECT_API_KEY_P8:-}" || -z "${APP_STORE_CONNECT_KEY_ID:-}" || -z "${APP_STORE_CONNECT_ISSUER_ID:-}" ]]; then
   echo "Missing APP_STORE_CONNECT_* env vars (API key, key id, issuer id)." >&2

@@ -4,12 +4,12 @@
         <title>CodexBar</title>
         <item>
             <title>0.5.3</title>
-            <pubDate>Sat, 22 Nov 2025 22:58:05 +0100</pubDate>
+            <pubDate>Sat, 22 Nov 2025 23:07:34 +0100</pubDate>
             <link>https://raw.githubusercontent.com/steipete/CodexBar/main/appcast.xml</link>
-            <sparkle:version>18</sparkle:version>
+            <sparkle:version>19</sparkle:version>
             <sparkle:shortVersionString>0.5.3</sparkle:shortVersionString>
             <sparkle:minimumSystemVersion>15.0</sparkle:minimumSystemVersion>
-            <enclosure url="https://github.com/steipete/CodexBar/releases/download/v0.5.3/CodexBar-0.5.3.zip" length="2667645" type="application/octet-stream" sparkle:edSignature="N/n+OZBbfC2FI0cOZK59mNeYC9EKM4uwPDKchnPhl9215LVp2dPS6/GwTq0P56U5LlexwJxBTx4LTguZtP9HAg=="/>
